h6a7526c8g39f1g4ee3gb52bg590b30b2774a: 'Helpless old biddy' - a classic routine. I'm kicking myself for not seeing through it.
h202d696fg6814g4829g8e72g61165e4fa02a: She used us, and those two brothers paid for it.
hbc6acec6g3670g4047ga76fg9134d32b5e77: I reckon the sister's in trouble, too. We need to pay Ethel a visit.
hb6fdd767g8efdg47afg818bgbeaca158029c: Why so suspicious? She's an old lady who needed help.
hafba6a3eg9747g4e37g9435g9989c0a985f0: I hope you're right. Otherwise, this Mayrina's in trouble - and we just knocked out her kin.
h2262c4fag5a44g4315g973cg6481990e3c96: I hope you're right. Otherwise, this Mayrina's in trouble - and we just murdered her kin.
